revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>{{namespace detect<!--
-->|main={{ifpreview|1={{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|2=}}<!--
-->|other={{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Talk|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}<!--
    Talk         -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{BASEPAGENAMEE}}}}<!--
    Talk subpage -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}}}<!--
    Not Talk     -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}
          }}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{Documentation}}
<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{namespace detect<!-- -->|main={{ifpreview|1={{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|2=}}<!-- -->|other={{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Talk|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}<!-- Talk -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{BASEPAGENAMEE}}}}<!-- Talk subpage -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}}}<!-- Not Talk -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} }} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23125537382|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{namespace detect<!-- -->|main={{ifpreview|1={{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|2=}}<!-- -->|other={{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Talk|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}<!-- Talk -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{BASEPAGENAMEE}}}}<!-- Talk subpage -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}}}<!-- Not Talk -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} }} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Automated_tools here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Automated_tools for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <includeonly>{{namespace detect<!-- -->|main={{ifpreview|1={{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}|2=}}<!-- -->|other={{#ifeq:{{NAMESPACE}}|Talk|{{#ifeq:{{PAGENAME}}|{{ROOTPAGENAME}}<!-- Talk -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{BASEPAGENAMEE}}}}<!-- Talk subpage -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}}}}<!-- Not Talk -->|{{Automated tools/core|{{FULLPAGENAMEE}}}} }} }}</includeonly><noinclude> {{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]] <!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage -->
[[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
